items.briefing:
A critical security flaw in Cisco SD-WAN software is actively being exploited by attackers, so any staff or IT teams using Cisco networking equipment should ensure updates are applied urgently. Separately, researchers have flagged authentication bypass vulnerabilities in both Cisco and Palo Alto products — meaning attackers could potentially access systems without valid credentials. If your organisation uses these products, flag this with your IT support immediately.

On a more positive note, KnowBe4 has launched a free cyber safety resource called CAPY for families, which may be useful to share with students and parents. **Practical tip:** If you receive any urgent prompts to click links or provide login details — even appearing to come from trusted tools — verify requests through official channels before acting.
